title: Automate backfill of timelines based on a milestone
excerpt: I have a board I’m using for project management. Each item is a step in the project and is dependent on the steps before it. I am using the timeline column as well as the duration column. I am wanting to be able to put a…

posts.author: snugent (Stephanie Nugent)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a board I’m using for project management. Each item is a step in the project and is dependent on the steps before it. I am using the timeline column as well as the duration column. I am wanting to be able to put a final project milestone date and have it automatically backfill the timelines for the steps. Is that possible?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Stephanie! Have you tried setting dependencies? It sounds like this will help you keep your items in line with the ones before them!

Let me know if this won’t quite work for what you need and we can figure something else out!

posts.author: snugent (Stephanie Nugent)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes. We have dependencies set, but we want to be able to enter the due date/milestone for the file step and have the other timelines/due dates set for all the other steps prior to the final step.
